title: myosotis stolonifera subsp. hirsuta
intro: Myosotis stolonifera subsp. hirsuta, also known as hairy forget-me-not, is a perennial plant species in the borage family, native to Europe and western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a valuable resource for treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Myosotis stolonifera subsp. hirsuta have been found to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin conditions.
